reinvestment.agentAdvice: Based on your age (75) and RMD amount of $20325.20, the agent has allocated your distribution across 7 products prioritizing capital preservation, tax efficiency, and income generation. The top recommendation is High-Yield Savings Account, which offers the best balance of safety and yield for your profile. This reinvestment plan is projected to generate approximately $862.85 in annual income, ensuring your RMD continues working for you rather than sitting idle in a checking account.

suggestions.name: High-Yield Savings Account
suggestions.description: FDIC insured up to $250K. Best for emergency liquidity. No lock-in period.

suggestions.name: Certificate of Deposit (CD)
suggestions.description: 12-month CD. FDIC insured. Fixed rate locked in for the term. Early withdrawal penalty applies.

suggestions.name: US Treasury Bills (T-Bills)
suggestions.description: Backed by the US government. Exempt from state and local tax. Ideal for capital preservation.

suggestions.name: Municipal Bond Fund (MUB)
suggestions.description: Interest is federally tax-free. Excellent for clients in higher tax brackets. State tax-free if in-state bonds.

suggestions.name: Dividend ETF (SCHD / VYM)
suggestions.description: Diversified dividend-paying stocks. Combines income yield with long-term growth potential. Taxable dividends.

suggestions.name: Fixed Annuity
suggestions.description: Guaranteed interest rate. Tax-deferred growth. Option to convert to lifetime income stream. Ideal for longevity protection.

suggestions.name: Money Market Fund (VMFXX)
suggestions.description: Near-cash stability with better yield than checking accounts. Invests in short-term government and corporate debt.
